prompt: Overlay the red annotation from the reference image onto the corresponding region in the dental X-ray (image 1), preserving the underlying X-ray detail and ensuring clear medical highlighting.
prompt_refined: Overlay the red annotation from image 2 onto the dental X-ray in image 1, specifically over the wisdom tooth area on the right side. The overlay must be translucent, allowing the underlying X-ray details of the tooth and bone structure to remain clearly visible, serving as a clear medical highlight.
objects: Translucent red annotation over the wisdom tooth area
